servicesPage.pageTitle: Actaer Services: IT Consulting, Software & Product Development
servicesPage.pageDescription: Comprehensive tech solutions including IT consulting, custom software development, and product development to power your digital transformation.
servicesPage.heroDescription: From strategic consulting to hands-on development, we offer end-to-end services to power your digital transformation journey.
servicesPage.faqDescription: Answers to frequently asked questions about our services
servicesPage.faq1Question: How do I know which service is right for my business?
servicesPage.faq1Answer: It depends on your current stage. If you're exploring options or need strategic guidance, start with IT Consulting. If you have clear requirements and need implementation, Software Development is the way to go. If you're building a new product from scratch, our Product Development service covers the entire journey from idea to launch.
servicesPage.faq2Question: What technologies does Actaer work with?
servicesPage.faq2Answer: We work with modern, enterprise-grade technologies including React, Next.js, Vue.js for frontends; Node.js, .NET, and Java for backends; PostgreSQL, MongoDB, and Redis for data; and cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, and GCP. We also specialize in AI/ML solutions using the latest frameworks.
servicesPage.faq3Question: How long does a typical project take?
servicesPage.faq3Answer: Project timelines vary based on scope. A consulting engagement might take 2-4 weeks, while a custom software project could range from 2-6 months. Full product development typically spans 4-12 months. We'll provide a detailed timeline during our initial consultation.
servicesPage.faq4Question: Do you offer ongoing support after project completion?
servicesPage.faq4Answer: Yes! We offer various support and maintenance packages including bug fixes, performance monitoring, feature updates, and 24/7 critical support. We believe in long-term partnerships, not just one-time projects.
servicesPage.ctaTitle: Not Sure Which Service You Need?
servicesPage.ctaDescription: Let's have a conversation about your challenges. We'll help you find the right solution for your business.

itConsultingPage.pageTitle: IT Consulting Services: Strategy, Due Diligence & Transformation

itConsultingPage.heroDescription: Navigate the complex technology landscape with expert consulting that aligns your IT investments with business objectives. Actaer provides strategic IT consulting for digital transformation, project planning, due diligence, team augmentation, and data-driven decisions.

itConsultingPage.strategyDescription: We help organizations navigate the complex digital landscape with clear, actionable strategies that align technology investments with business goals.
itConsultingPage.planningDescription: Comprehensive project planning that ensures clear requirements, realistic timelines, and effective resource allocation for successful delivery.
itConsultingPage.dueDiligenceDescription: In-depth technical assessments for mergers, acquisitions, or major technology investments to identify risks and opportunities.
itConsultingPage.augmentationDescription: Scale your development capacity with experienced professionals who integrate seamlessly with your existing teams.

itConsultingPage.whyChooseTitle: Why Choose Actaer for IT Consulting?

Custom software development is the process of creating tailored applications using full-stack engineering, AI/ML, enterprise solutions, and real-time platforms to solve specific business challenges.

productDevPage.pageTitle: Product Development: From Idea to Market
productDevPage.pageDescription: End-to-end product development from ideation to launch. Prototyping, MVP development, user-centric design, and ongoing support.
productDevPage.heroDescription: Complete product development lifecycle with expert guidance, from initial concept to successful launch and beyond.
productDevPage.phasesDescription: A proven methodology that takes your product from concept to market success.
productDevPage.processDescription: A proven methodology that takes your product from concept to market success.
productDevPage.phase1Description: We work with you to define your product vision, identify target users, and validate market fit before writing a single line of code.
productDevPage.phase2Description: Transform ideas into working prototypes. We use user-focused designs that balance good looks with practical usability.
productDevPage.phase3Description: Build a minimum viable product quickly to validate assumptions and gather real user feedback.
productDevPage.phase4Description: Continuously improve based on user feedback, adding features and optimizing performance.
productDevPage.phase5Description: Go to market with confidence and scale your product to meet growing demand.
productDevPage.phase6Description: Ongoing support to keep your product running smoothly and evolving with your business.
productDevPage.whyDescription: We combine technical expertise with product thinking to build solutions that users love.
productDevPage.whyChooseDescription: We combine technical expertise with product thinking to build solutions that users love. Unlike traditional waterfall methods, our agile approach cuts time-to-market by 30-50%.
productDevPage.reason1Description: Every decision is guided by user needs and feedback, ensuring your solution solves real problems.
productDevPage.reason2Description: Iterative development with regular demos and feedback loops keeps you in control.
productDevPage.reason3Description: Clean, maintainable code and modern architecture that scales with your success.
productDevPage.reason4Description: We're invested in your success, providing ongoing support and strategic guidance.
productDevPage.ctaDescription: Let's discuss your product idea and create a roadmap to bring it to life.

banner.title: We use cookies
banner.description: We use cookies to enhance your browsing experience, analyze site traffic, and personalize content. By clicking "Accept All", you consent to our use of cookies.

preferences.title: Cookie Preferences
preferences.description: Manage your cookie preferences. You can enable or disable different types of cookies below. Learn more about how we use cookies in our

essential.title: Essential Cookies
essential.description: These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in, or filling in forms.

functional.title: Functional Cookies
functional.description: These cookies enable enhanced functionality and personalization, such as remembering your preferences, language settings, and providing improved features.

analytics.title: Analytics Cookies
analytics.description: These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with our website by collecting and reporting information anonymously. This helps us improve our website and services.

marketing.title: Marketing Cookies
marketing.description: These cookies may be set by our advertising partners to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant ads on other sites.

contact.title: Let's {highlighted}

contact.pageDescription: Get in touch with Actaer for software development, IT consulting, and product needs. Email office@actaer.com, call +381 64 9055722, or use our form. Novi Pazar, Serbia.
contact.getInTouchDescription: Whether you have a question about our services, want to discuss a project, or just want to say hello, we're here to help.

responseTime.question: What is your typical response time?
responseTime.answer: We typically respond to inquiries within 24 business hours. For urgent matters, please call us directly.

international.question: Do you work with international clients?
international.answer: Absolutely! We work with clients worldwide. Our team is experienced in remote collaboration and we adjust to different time zones as needed.

messageInfo.question: What information should I include in my message?
messageInfo.answer: Help us understand your project by including: (1) your business context, (2) the problem you're trying to solve, (3) any technical requirements, and (4) your timeline expectations.

freeConsultation.question: Do you offer free consultations?
freeConsultation.answer: Yes, we offer an initial free consultation to understand your needs and explore how we can help. No obligations, just a conversation about your project.

privacyPage.pageTitle: Privacy Policy | Actaer - Protecting Your Personal Data
privacyPage.pageDescription: Actaer Privacy Policy: Learn how we collect, use, disclose, share, and protect your personal information. Understand your rights under GDPR and contact us.
privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.intro: At Actaer, we take your privacy seriously. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website or use our services. We comply with GDPR (EU) 2016/679, protecting data for approximately 448 million EU residents.

collect.title: Information We Collect
collect.description: We may collect information about you in various ways, including:

items.contact: Contact information (name, email, phone number) when you fill out forms
items.usage: Usage data about how you interact with our website
items.device: Device information such as browser type, operating system, and IP address
items.cookies: Cookie data and similar tracking technologies

use.title: How We Use Your Information
use.description: We use the information we collect for various purposes:

items.services: To provide and maintain our services
items.communication: To communicate with you about inquiries and updates
items.improvement: To improve our website and services

sharing.title: Data Sharing
sharing.description: We do not sell your personal information. We share information only with trusted service providers. They help us operate our website and conduct business. They agree to keep it confidential.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.description: Depending on your location, you may have certain rights regarding your personal data:

items.access: Right to access your personal data
items.deletion: Right to request deletion of your data
items.objection: Right to object to data processing

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us at

cookiesPage.pageTitle: Actaer Cookie Policy: Types of Cookies Used and Privacy Management
cookiesPage.pageDescription: Actaer uses essential, functional, analytics & marketing cookies for functionality, personalization, insights & ads. Manage preferences via settings. Updated Jan 2026.
cookiesPage.title: Cookie Policy
cookiesPage.intro: This Cookie Policy explains how Actaer uses cookies and similar tracking technologies when you visit our website. By using our website, you consent to the use of cookies in accordance with this policy.

whatAreCookies.title: What Are Cookies?
whatAreCookies.description: Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device when you visit a website. They help websites remember your preferences and understand how you use the site.

types.title: Types of Cookies We Use
types.description: We use different types of cookies for various purposes:

essential.title: Essential Cookies
essential.description: These cookies are necessary for the website to function properly. They enable basic functions like page navigation and access to secure areas.

functional.title: Functional Cookies
functional.description: These cookies remember your preferences and choices to provide a more personalized experience.

analytics.title: Analytics Cookies
analytics.description: These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with our website by collecting anonymous information.

marketing.title: Marketing Cookies
marketing.description: These cookies track your browsing habits to deliver advertisements more relevant to you and your interests.

managing.title: Managing Your Cookie Preferences
managing.description: You can manage your cookie preferences at any time by clicking the "Cookie Settings" link in our website footer.
managing.browserSettings: You can also control cookies through your browser settings. Note that disabling certain cookies may affect the functionality of our website.

thirdParty.title: Third-Party Cookies
thirdParty.description: We use the following third-party services that may set cookies:
thirdParty.vercel: Web analytics to understand site performance
thirdParty.clarity: Session recordings and heatmaps to improve user experience

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: If you have questions about our use of cookies, please contact us at

vantumErpPage.pageDescription: Modern distribution ERP for wholesalers, distributors, and retail chains. Inventory management, sales orders, purchasing, and AI-powered replenishment.
vantumErpPage.heroDescription: ERP without the legacy baggage. Built for modern wholesalers, distributors, retail chains, and 3PL providers.

modules.title: Four Powerful Modules
modules.description: Everything you need to manage your distribution business, in one integrated platform.

inventory.title: Inventory Management
inventory.description: Real-time stock visibility across unlimited warehouses with lot tracking, serial numbers, and bin locations.

sales.title: Sales Orders
sales.description: Complete quote-to-cash workflow with real-time availability checks and automatic inventory reservation.

purchasing.title: Purchasing
purchasing.description: Streamlined vendor management with PO automation, lead time tracking, and cost analysis.

replenishment.title: Smart Replenishment
replenishment.description: AI-assisted reorder point calculations with automatic PO generation based on sales velocity.

comparison.title: Legacy ERP vs Vantum
comparison.description: See why modern businesses are choosing Vantum over traditional ERP systems.

techStack.title: Enterprise-Grade Architecture
techStack.description: Built on modern, proven technologies for reliability, performance, and security.

subSecond.title: Sub-second Response
subSecond.description: Optimized queries and caching for blazing-fast performance.

security.title: Enterprise Security
security.description: RBAC, audit logging, and encryption at rest and in transit.

api.title: 100% API Coverage
api.description: Full REST API access for seamless integrations.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Everything you need to know about Vantum ERP

q1.question: What is Vantum ERP?
q1.answer: Vantum ERP is a modern distribution ERP system designed specifically for wholesalers, distributors, retail chains, and 3PL providers. It features AI-powered inventory replenishment, real-time analytics, and 100% API coverage—all without the complexity of legacy ERP systems.

q2.question: How is Vantum ERP different from traditional ERP systems?
q2.answer: Unlike legacy ERPs that require extensive customization and long implementation cycles, Vantum ERP is built with modern cloud-native architecture. It offers 10x faster implementation, unlimited users with no per-seat licensing, zero hidden fees, and AI-native features out of the box.

q3.question: What industries does Vantum ERP serve?
q3.answer: Vantum ERP is optimized for distribution-focused businesses including wholesale distributors, retail chains with multiple locations, 3PL (third-party logistics) providers, and any business managing complex inventory across multiple warehouses.

q4.question: Does Vantum ERP include AI features?
q4.answer: Yes! Vantum ERP includes AI-powered inventory replenishment that analyzes sales patterns, seasonality, and lead times to automatically generate optimal purchase suggestions. This helps reduce stockouts while minimizing excess inventory.

q5.question: How can I get started with Vantum ERP?
q5.answer: We're currently accepting enterprises for our 2026 pilot program. Visit vantumerp.com for more information or contact our sales team to schedule a demo.

cta.title: Join the 2026 Pilot Program
cta.description: We're accepting a limited number of enterprises for our pilot program. Get early access and shape the future of distribution ERP.

aboutPage.pageTitle: About Actaer: Tech Consulting Firm in Serbia
aboutPage.pageDescription: Learn about Actaer, founded in 2015 — a full-service tech consulting firm in Novi Pazar, Serbia. Specializing in IT consulting, custom software development, and digital transformation for global clients.
aboutPage.heroDescription: We're a full-service tech consulting firm transforming businesses into agile, software-powered innovators. Technology is the key to unlocking your potential.

story.title: Our Story
story.paragraph1: Actaer is a full-service technology consulting firm founded in 2015 in Novi Pazar, Serbia. With a team of 15-25 experts, we specialize in IT consulting, custom software development, and product development.
story.paragraph2: We set out to change that. Our founding team has experience in enterprise software, startups, and consulting. We know what works, what fails, and why many tech projects do not succeed.
story.paragraph3: As a new firm, we offer fresh views and modern methods — free from old ideas. We partner with businesses of all sizes to build software that works well, grows as needed, and adds true value.
story.paragraph4: Our first product, Vantum ERP, embodies everything we believe about software: it's modern, user-friendly, and built for how businesses actually operate today.

values.title: Our Values

resultsDriven.title: Results-Driven
resultsDriven.description: We measure success by the impact we create for our clients, not by hours logged or lines of code written.

collaborative.title: Collaborative
